The Experience to Lead.
The Results to Prove It.

Executive-level consulting and management that builds stronger operations, healthier practices, and measurable results.

With 30 years of senior executive and C-suite experience, I have worked with more than 200 physicians and APPs across 11 specialties — launching practices, turning around underperforming organizations, and delivering measurable results for physicians and healthcare organizations ready to perform at a higher level.
